mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly payroll growth signals robust labor market conditions, increasing corporate revenue visibility and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in months with PAYEMS growth > 100k are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.05 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in CPIAUCSL indicates disinflationary pressures, prompting central bank rate cuts that lower discount rates and generate positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in disinflation periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 2-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Strong quarterly GDP growth (GDPC1) reflects expanding economic activity, increasing corporate earnings expectations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in GDP growth quarters are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.04 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in INDPRO and decreases in UNRATE signal strong industrial activity and labor market tightness, boosting corporate margins and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in co-moving INDPRO/UNRATE regimes are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or interaction effect size < 0.15 in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: During monetary tightening cycles, rising FEDFUNDS signals higher discount rates that reduce equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in rate hike periods are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC > 0.05 in 2-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts (HOUST) indicate elevated construction activity, boosting related sectors and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in high HOUST periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 in 2-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) reflects increased manufacturing output, boosting corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in INDPRO growth periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.04 in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in RSAFS (consumer credit) and FEDFUNDS indicate strong consumer demand despite higher borrowing costs, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in co-moving RSAFS/FEDFUNDS regimes are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or interaction effect size < 0.12 in 3-year rolling windows.
